goal: Validate whether the microstructure feature family (primarily cf_micro_imbalance_1h) provides a genuine overlay alpha over the immutable base through a disciplined veto-first, lockbox-verified pipeline.
global_constraints: Immutable base active-signal-v1@1 must never be modified or re-tuned
Only microstructure_proxies family is active; all other feature families are locked

Do not reopen closed directions: leadership/breadth as directional edge, path-asymmetry, regime-disagreement, event-only overlays, trade-quality overlays without new information layer, derivatives positioning without real OI/liquidation/basis data
Lockbox overlay comparison (base vs base+overlay on same window) is mandatory before any strong conclusion
Simpler methods must be tested before complex models (bucket rule → threshold → logistic → CatBoost)
Short side is tested before long side at every stage
Veto overlay must be proven before early-cut or directional scout routes are unlocked
net_pnl > 0 must not be used as veto label — too noisy
Feature set limited to micro-core + minimal context support; no re-injection of old large feature packs
No feature/label/threshold selection on lockbox window; lockbox is truth-only

slices.title: Optional route execution (exploration)
slices.hypothesis: Execute only the route that genuinely earned opening — either early-cut (post-entry micro-features + minimal model) or directional scout (simple rule first, then small model) — and test against base on lockbox.
slices.objective: Execute only the route that genuinely earned opening — either early-cut (post-entry micro-features + minimal model) or directional scout (simple rule first, then small model) — and test against base on lockbox.
success_criteria: Opened route executed with selection and lockbox quality checks
Delta vs base assessed for meaningfulness
Final decision recorded for the route
evidence_requirements: Opened route executed with selection and lockbox quality checks
Delta vs base assessed for meaningfulness
Final decision recorded for the route
slices.gate_hint: Only executes if stage_9 opened at least one route; skipped entirely if both routes remain locked

slices.hypothesis: Execute only the route that genuinely earned opening — either early-cut (post-entry micro-features + minimal model) or directional scout (simple rule first, then small model) — and test against base on lockbox.

slices.title: Final v10 verdict
slices.hypothesis: Deliver an honest terminal verdict on the microstructure family: PROMOTE if working overlay proven, WATCHLIST if partial result, REJECT if lockbox failed — with clear next steps.
slices.objective: Deliver an honest terminal verdict on the microstructure family: PROMOTE if working overlay proven, WATCHLIST if partial result, REJECT if lockbox failed — with clear next steps.
success_criteria: Final route classification assigned (PROMOTE / WATCHLIST / REJECT)
Clear next step defined and documented
evidence_requirements: Final route classification assigned (PROMOTE / WATCHLIST / REJECT)
Clear next step defined and documented
